所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

U

updateUserAge(String, int) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.UserControllerImpl
Updates a user's age.
updateUserGender(String, boolean) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.UserControllerImpl
Updates a user's gender.
updateUserPassword(String, String) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.UserControllerImpl
Updates a user's password (auto-encrypted via MD5).
UserController - controller中的接口
用户控制器接口，定义用户注册、登录、注销及用户信息相关操作。
UserControllerImpl - controller.Impl中的类
User controller for managing user authentication, registration, and profile settings.
UserControllerImpl() - 类的构造器 controller.Impl.UserControllerImpl
Initializes the user controller and loads user data from file.
UserModel - model中的类
Data model representing a user with authentication and profile details.
UserModel() - 类的构造器 model.UserModel
 
UserModel(String, String, boolean, int) - 类的构造器 model.UserModel
Creates a user model with full details.
util - 程序包 util
